testcase.name: test_directus_health_check
testcase.failure:
self = <test_sdk_validacoes_dados.TestValidacoesDadosSDK object at 0x7ac86a6e1ba0> directus_session = <requests.sessions.Session object at 0x7ac86a638440> e2e_ui_config = E2EUIConfig(directus_url='http://directus:8055', api_url='http://api-server:8001', admin_email='admin@example.com', ad...rd123!', directus_token='g52oLdjEmwURNK4KmqjAXEtY3e4DCUzP', playwright_headless=True, playwright_slow_mo=0, timeout=60)
def test_directus_health_check( self, directus_session, e2e_ui_config ): """Valida que Directus está saudável.""" response = directus_session.get( f"{e2e_ui_config.directus_url}/server/health" )
> assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
tests/e2e_ui/test_sdk_validacoes_dados.py:85: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_api_versiona_health_check

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False is True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7ac86a60d280>('directus_connected') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7ac86a60d280> = {'directus_connected': False, 'directus_url': 'http://directus:8055', 'status': 'ok', 'timestamp': '2026-05-15T18:53:53.539237', ...}.get

testcase.failure:
self = <test_sdk_validacoes_dados.TestValidacoesDadosSDK object at 0x7ac86a735490> api_session = <requests.sessions.Session object at 0x7ac86a71f610> e2e_ui_config = E2EUIConfig(directus_url='http://directus:8055', api_url='http://api-server:8001', admin_email='admin@example.com', ad...rd123!', directus_token='g52oLdjEmwURNK4KmqjAXEtY3e4DCUzP', playwright_headless=True, playwright_slow_mo=0, timeout=60)
def test_api_versiona_health_check( self, api_session, e2e_ui_config ): """Valida que API Versiona está saudável.""" response = api_session.get( f"{e2e_ui_config.api_url}/health" )
assert response.status_code == 200 data = response.json()
assert data["status"] == "ok" > assert data.get("directus_connected") is True E AssertionError: assert False is True E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7ac86a60d280>('directus_connected') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7ac86a60d280> = {'directus_connected': False, 'directus_url': 'http://directus:8055', 'status': 'ok', 'timestamp': '2026-05-15T18:53:53.539237', ...}.get
tests/e2e_ui/test_sdk_validacoes_dados.py:102: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_login_page_loads

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.wait_for_selector: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator("input[type=\"email\"]") to be visible

testcase.failure:
self = <test_ui_directus_login.TestDirectusLogin object at 0x7ac86a71d1d0> page = <Page url='http://directus:8055/admin/login'> e2e_ui_config = E2EUIConfig(directus_url='http://directus:8055', api_url='http://api-server:8001', admin_email='admin@example.com', ad...rd123!', directus_token='g52oLdjEmwURNK4KmqjAXEtY3e4DCUzP', playwright_headless=True, playwright_slow_mo=0, timeout=60)
def test_login_page_loads(self, page: Page, e2e_ui_config): """Valida que página de login carrega corretamente.""" page.goto(f"{e2e_ui_config.directus_url}/admin/login")
# Aguardar formulário de login > page.wait_for_selector('input[type="email"]', timeout=10000)
tests/e2e_ui/test_ui_directus_login.py:17: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ .venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:8525: in wait_for_selector self._sync( .venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_page.py:419: in wait_for_selector return await self._main_frame.wait_for_selector(**locals_to_params(locals())) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:369: in wait_for_selector await self._channel.send( .venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <playwright._impl._connection.Connection object at 0x7ac86a63a270> cb = <function Channel.send.<locals>.<lambda> at 0x7ac86a61e480> is_internal = False, title = None
async def wrap_api_call( self, cb: Callable[[], Any], is_internal: bool = False, title: str = None ) -> Any: if self._api_zone.get(): return await cb() task = asyncio.current_task(self._loop) st: List[inspect.FrameInfo] = getattr( task, "__pw_stack__", None ) or inspect.stack(0)
parsed_st = _extract_stack_trace_information_from_stack(st, is_internal, title) self._api_zone.set(parsed_st) try: return await cb() except Exception as error: > raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.wait_for_selector: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. E Call log: E - waiting for locator("input[type=\"email\"]") to be visible
.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:559: TimeoutError

testcase.name: test_navigate_to_dashboard

error.message: failed on setup with "playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.wait_for_selector: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator("input[type=\"email\"]") to be visible"

testcase.error:
page = <Page url='http://directus:8055/admin/login'> e2e_ui_config = E2EUIConfig(directus_url='http://directus:8055', api_url='http://api-server:8001', admin_email='admin@example.com', ad...rd123!', directus_token='g52oLdjEmwURNK4KmqjAXEtY3e4DCUzP', playwright_headless=True, playwright_slow_mo=0, timeout=60)
@pytest.fixture def directus_page_logged( page: Page, e2e_ui_config: E2EUIConfig ) -> Generator[Page, None, None]: """Página já autenticada no Directus Admin.""" # Navegar para login page.goto(f"{e2e_ui_config.directus_url}/admin/login")
# Aguardar formulário de login > page.wait_for_selector('input[type="email"]', timeout=10000)

self = <playwright._impl._connection.Connection object at 0x7ac86a63a270> cb = <function Channel.send.<locals>.<lambda> at 0x7ac86a4b8ae0> is_internal = False, title = None
async def wrap_api_call( self, cb: Callable[[], Any], is_internal: bool = False, title: str = None ) -> Any: if self._api_zone.get(): return await cb() task = asyncio.current_task(self._loop) st: List[inspect.FrameInfo] = getattr( task, "__pw_stack__", None ) or inspect.stack(0)
parsed_st = _extract_stack_trace_information_from_stack(st, is_internal, title) self._api_zone.set(parsed_st) try: return await cb() except Exception as error: > raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.wait_for_selector: Timeout 10000ms exceeded.
